event_blocks.summary: The video begins with the Person in blue beanie and glasses walking along a leaf-strewn path in a serene park, passing a stone sculpture and seated couple, then eating a meal. He transitions to a bustling shrine entrance, followed by a modern art space where a Woman in patterned scarf stands. A Person pours coffee in a bright café, before the scene cuts to a residential street with a 'COFFEE & DOUGHNUTS' sign. The Person in blue beanie and glasses, now on a crowded street with billboards, states his intention to visit Meiji Jingu, seeking greenery. He navigates a busy intersection, a subway station, and boards a Green train. He walks a tree-lined street with yellow leaves, passing a storefront and Uber vehicle. He then walks through a quiet urban street, planning to get food and coffee, passing potted plants and a green mailbox before entering the 'dotcom space' café in Shibuya. He orders a cold brew and flat white, then enjoys waffles with green ice cream, commenting on the dessert. Exiting the café, he heads to the shrine, entering through a torii gate and expressing awe at the natural environment. He walks a forested path at Meiji Jingu, reflecting on solo travel and the freedom it provides. He observes a wall of sake barrels and performs a ritual hand-washing at a wooden water basin, accompanied by the sound of running water. The video concludes with a wide shot of the Main shrine building and the Person in blue beanie and glasses standing in front of it, noting the emerging sun.

Person pouring coffee.description: Wears a white shirt and is seen pouring coffee from a metal kettle into a glass carafe in a café.

Subway commuters.description: Various individuals descending stairs into a subway station, one carrying a blue bag and another with a black backpack.

Green train.description: A train with a green front and digital display, arriving at the platform.

Group of pedestrians.description: A diverse group walking along the gravel path and courtyard of Meiji Jingu, some carrying bags or wearing winter clothing, moving toward or away from the shrine buildings.

Woman in patterned scarf.description: Wears black-rimmed glasses and a patterned scarf, standing in a modern art gallery space.

Uber vehicle.description: A black car with 'Uber' branding visible on the side, parked on a city street.

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: Wears a blue beanie with white patterns, black-rimmed glasses, a camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie, and earphones; heard speaking directly to the camera about their experience with solo travel, expressing feelings of freedom and comfort, stating their intention to "wash my hands and rinse my mouth" during the purification ritual, and finally announcing, "We made it to the shrine. The sun is coming out, so nice."

Waffle dish with green ice cream.description: A plate of golden-brown waffles topped with vibrant green ice cream, blueberries, a rosemary sprig, and a small red garnish, served with a cup of coffee labeled 'PERU tunki inambari'; described by the person as 'so good' and a 'dessert for breakfast' that he had to try.

dotcom space café.description: A modern, minimalist café with large glass windows, wooden furniture, and a visible coffee machine; located in Shibuya, Tokyo, with a menu featuring Japanese text and images of food and drinks, where the person orders coffee and a flat white amidst upbeat background music and subtle café ambience.

Meiji Jingu shrine entrance.description: A large wooden torii gate marking the entrance to Meiji Jingu, surrounded by tall trees and a gravel path covered in fallen autumn leaves, with visitors walking through the serene park-like grounds.

Sake barrel wall.description: A long wall lined with stacked white sake barrels, each decorated with colorful Japanese characters and logos, likely representing offerings or dedications to the shrine.

Main shrine building.description: A large, ornate wooden structure with a sweeping tiled roof, multiple pillars, and decorative elements, serving as the central temple of Meiji Jingu, with visitors ascending its steps.

Shrine water basin.description: A traditional wooden hand-washing station with a bamboo ladle, used by visitors to purify their hands before entering the shrine grounds, accompanied by the sound of running water as the Person in blue beanie and glasses performs the ritual.

raw_segments: The minute opens with gentle, melancholic instrumental music featuring piano, strings, and light percussion, accompanied by soft background chatter and the clinking of cutlery. A serene park scene unfolds, showing a person in a blue beanie and glasses walking along a leaf-strewn path, passing a large stone sculpture and a couple seated at a table. The camera then offers a close-up of this same person eating a meal with a fork. The scene transitions to a bustling shrine entrance marked by a torii gate, where visitors walk through, followed by an indoor shot of a modern, minimalist space where a woman with glasses and a patterned scarf stands among art installations. Next, a person pours coffee into a glass carafe in a bright, open café, before the video cuts to a quiet residential street with a 'COFFEE & DOUGHNUTS' sign. A group of people walk past a modern building displaying a 'Gallery' sign. The music fades as the person in the blue beanie, now on a crowded urban street with bright IKEA and YOKOHAMA billboards, speaks directly to the camera in a clear male voice, stating, "Good morning, we're back in Shibuya Crossing. Seems like I do this every morning now. But I wanted to go check out Meiji Jingu this morning, which is a shrine. I've mostly been like in the city. I think there's like more greenery over there, so I want to see some of that." As he speaks, the scene shifts to a busy city intersection with a large bus and a 'TAX-FREE' sign, then to a subway station where people descend stairs. The person in the beanie is seen waiting on a platform as a green train arrives, which he then boards. The segment concludes with him walking along a tree-lined city street adorned with yellow ginkgo leaves, passing a storefront with a 'P' sign and an Uber vehicle, all set to an upbeat, modern instrumental track with a strong beat and synth elements.

The minute opens with the Person in blue beanie and glasses walking through a quiet urban street, narrating his plans to the camera, stating, "Me, I'm going to quick pit stop, but I get some food and I want to get some coffee." He passes a building with potted plants and a green mailbox before ascending a set of stone stairs, leading to the modern 'dotcom space' café in Shibuya, Tokyo, as upbeat, chill background music begins to play. Inside, he sits at a wooden counter, reviewing a menu with Japanese text and images, and places an order, saying, "I'll do the cold brew and a flat white, please." He is later seen enjoying a plate of waffles topped with vibrant green ice cream, blueberries, and a rosemary sprig, alongside a cup of coffee labeled 'PERU tunki inambari'. He comments on his meal, "All right, I really wasn't planning to eat dessert for breakfast, but it looks so good and I had to try it. And it was good, but I need some real food eventually." After finishing, he exits the café, announcing his next destination, "We're going to go walk over to the shrine. I think I have a good spot for lunch." As he walks toward Meiji Jingu, the background music fades, replaced by natural sounds like birds and the distinct crunch of footsteps on gravel. He enters the serene shrine grounds through a large wooden torii gate, walking along a tree-lined path covered in fallen leaves, continuing to speak to the camera and expressing his awe, "I'm not sure what I was expecting, but this is awesome. Look at these trees. Oh wow, that's so beautiful right there. Looks crazy. I'm so glad this is..." as the atmosphere shifts from urban to a peaceful, natural park environment.

The video begins with a serene view of a forested path at Meiji Jingu, covered in fallen autumn leaves, with trees displaying vibrant red and orange foliage. The distinct sound of footsteps on gravel accompanies the scene as the camera transitions to a wide gravel path where the Person in blue beanie and glasses is seen walking among other visitors, ascending toward the shrine. Speaking directly to the camera, they reflect on solo travel, stating, "I think this is actually one of the first times that I've solo traveled... you can just go at your own pace. I'm not in any rush right now." They continue, "I'm just so free, you know, I could do literally whatever I want. It's a good feeling," noting that the more time they spend alone, "I just get more used to it and comfortable with myself." The scene shifts to a close-up of a wall adorned with numerous sake barrels, each labeled with Japanese characters, indicating offerings or dedications. The Person in blue beanie and glasses then appears in a selfie-style shot, continuing their thoughts on solo travel as they walk through the park, with traditional torii gates and trees in the background. They continue walking, passing by a stone lantern and other visitors, before stopping to perform a ritual hand-washing at a wooden water basin, stating their intention, "wash my hands and rinse my mouth," accompanied by the sound of running water. Gentle, melancholic instrumental music begins to play in the background. The camera then captures a wide shot of the main shrine building, a grand wooden structure with a sweeping roof and multiple pillars, as people gather on the steps and in the courtyard. The video concludes with the Person in blue beanie and glasses standing in front of the shrine, speaking to the camera, "We made it to the shrine. The sun is coming out, so nice," with the bustling courtyard and traditional architecture behind them, as the instrumental music continues.

event_blocks.summary: The Person in blue beanie and glasses, clad in a camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie, blue beanie, and black-rimmed glasses, first visited the Meiji Jingu shrine, writing a wish on a wooden plaque at a designated table and describing the experience as escaping to another world, finding the shrine calm, peaceful, and an oasis compared to the city. After walking through tree-lined paths covered in fallen autumn leaves and gesturing toward the large torii gate, they declared the experience 'sick,' 'much needed,' and felt 'refreshed' and 'like a new person.' Transitioning to urban travel, the individual boarded a Green train on a bustling subway platform, noting the rapid arrival of another train, and then navigated a narrow Tokyo alley. They explained their plan to visit Udon Shin in Shinjuku, which had a two-hour wait, so they decided to try a ramen shop called Fūnji next door, observing a line there as well. Inside the dimly lit Fūnji ramen shop, they used a touchscreen ordering kiosk displaying menu items in Japanese and English, selected a ¥1,500 ramen dish, and paid with cash. Later, the person entered a modern building with glass walls and Japanese signage, planning to 'hop back on the train and head to Shinjuku' for the noodle spot, but expressed urgency and slight panic about missing an approaching train.

Meiji Jingu shrine entrance.description: A large wooden torii gate marking the entrance to Meiji Jingu, surrounded by tall trees and a gravel path covered in fallen autumn leaves, with visitors walking through the serene park-like grounds.

Shrine water basin.description: A traditional wooden hand-washing station with a bamboo ladle, used by visitors to purify their hands before entering the shrine grounds.

Group of pedestrians.description: A diverse group walking along the gravel path and courtyard of Meiji Jingu, some carrying bags or wearing winter clothing, moving toward or away from the shrine buildings.

Wish writing table.description: A white table with printed instructions in Japanese and English, including 'Please write down wishes and prayers,' where visitors write their wishes before hanging them.

Wooden wish plaque.description: A small, rectangular wooden plaque with Japanese characters and a floral design, used by visitors to write and hang their wishes at the shrine.

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: A male speaker wearing a blue beanie with white patterns, black-rimmed glasses, a camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie, and earphones; he is heard commenting on the arrival of a train, discussing his experience at 'Udon Shin in Shinjuku' where he faced a two-hour wait, expressing hunger, and searching for a quicker ramen shop, noting another line upon arrival.

Touchscreen ordering kiosk interface.description: A digital display showing menu options in Japanese and English, including images of ramen dishes, prices, and a payment section; the screen prompts the user to take their ticket and change after payment.

Fūnji ramen shop.description: A small, popular ramen restaurant in a narrow Tokyo alley, with a wooden exterior, a line of customers, and a self-service ordering system; the interior is dimly lit and crowded with patrons.

Fūnji.description: A small, crowded ramen shop located in a narrow alley, with a line of customers waiting outside and a self-service touchscreen ordering kiosk inside; the speaker refers to it as 'this ramen spot' and notes 'a line here too' upon approaching it.

Subway commuters.description: Various individuals descending stairs into a subway station, one carrying a blue bag and another with a black backpack, seen in the initial platform scene.

Touchscreen ordering kiosk.description: A digital self-service terminal inside Fūnji displaying menu items like 'Ramen' and 'Extra large noodles', with Japanese and English text, and payment options including cash and card; the screen shows a total of ¥1,500 after selection.

Green train.description: A train with a green front and digital display, arriving at the platform, with passengers boarding and alighting.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a wide shot of the Meiji Jingu shrine courtyard, where a diverse group of pedestrians, some in traditional attire and others in modern winter clothing, walk along a paved path under a large wooden torii gate, all set to a gentle, calming background music. The scene transitions to a close-up of a person, identified as the 'Person in blue beanie and glasses,' wearing a camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie, a blue beanie, and black-rimmed glasses, as they carefully write a wish on a small wooden plaque at a designated table with instructions like 'Please write down wishes and prayers.' The person's voice is heard expressing how 'nice' it is, feeling like they've 'escaped to another world,' describing the shrine as 'very calm, very peaceful' and 'like an oasis,' contrasting it with the city outside. The camera then follows this individual as they walk through the serene, tree-lined paths covered in fallen autumn leaves, speaking directly to the camera with expressive gestures. The environment shifts from the open courtyard to a shaded forest path, then back to the shrine entrance, where the person gestures toward the large torii gate, saying 'Goodbye.' They reflect on the experience, stating, 'That was sick. Much needed. I feel refreshed. I feel like a new person.' The final frames show the person entering a modern, well-lit building with glass walls and Japanese signage, continuing to speak to the camera about their plans to 'hop back on the train and head to Shinjuku' for a 'noodle spot.' Their tone becomes urgent as they realize the train is coming, exclaiming, 'I gotta make this,' followed by a slight panic, 'Oh no, I don't think I'm gonna make it,' as the background music fades out.

The video opens on a bustling subway platform as a Green train with a digital display arrives, accompanied by upbeat, electronic background music and train sounds. The Person in blue beanie and glasses, among other commuters, waits and boards, commenting, "60 seconds have passed and there's already another train." The scene transitions to him walking through a narrow urban alley in Tokyo, speaking directly to the camera. He is clearly visible in his blue beanie with white patterns, black-rimmed glasses, and camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie, gesturing and occasionally adjusting his beanie. He explains, "Alright, so I just went to this restaurant called Udon Shin in Shinjuku. Apparently, it's a very popular restaurant because the line is over two hours long. So, I just put my name down and I'm going to come back. I still should probably eat because I'm kind of hungry and I don't think I can wait two hours. So, there's like a ramen shop right next door that is also one that I had down. And then I think, you know, if I still have to wait after that, then I'll just explore this area a little bit. But let's see if this ramen spot is a little bit... a little quicker." He navigates the quiet side street, still accompanied by the electronic music, before approaching a small, crowded ramen shop called Fūnji, where a line of people waits outside. He observes, "Looks like there's a line here too." Inside the dimly lit, cozy interior, he interacts with a self-service touchscreen ordering kiosk, displaying menu items in Japanese and English, selecting a ramen dish priced at ¥1,500, and completes the transaction by inserting cash, marking a transition from the open, overcast city streets to a local dining experience.

event_blocks.summary: Inside Fūnji, a bustling ramen shop situated in a narrow Tokyo alley, the Person in blue beanie and glasses sat at the wooden counter amidst lively background chatter and Japanese speech, receiving a steaming ramen bowl adorned with a soft-boiled egg and seaweed, accompanied by a side plate of noodles, which he consumed with gusto using chopsticks. Transitioning to the exterior, the individual, now clad in a camouflage jacket over his blue hoodie and beanie, navigated a busy city street. Addressing the camera in English, he voiced concern over his fullness, stating, "I fear I may have made a mistake because I'm so full. I'm actually so full. Like, I could barely even finish the noodles that they gave us." He identified the establishment's specialty, "Yeah, that spot is famous for its Tsukemen, which I guess is the like dipping ramen. It's really good, but now I'm concerned because this was supposed to be lunch number one. And I'm just really not sure if I can make it to Udonchin after that. I feel like I have a food coma right now." While speaking, he adjusted his hood and jacket, revealing a blue beanie with white patterns, and continued walking through an urban alleyway featuring shops and signage, including a 'YOLCO' storefront, gesturing periodically within the active environment.

Touchscreen ordering kiosk interface.description: A digital display showing menu options in Japanese and English, including images of ramen dishes, prices, and a payment section; the screen prompts the user to take their ticket and change after payment, though not directly shown, it is part of the established context of the shop's ordering process.

Fūnji ramen shop.description: A small, popular ramen restaurant in a narrow Tokyo alley, with a wooden exterior, a line of customers, and a self-service ordering system; the interior is dimly lit and crowded with patrons, where Japanese speech and restaurant sounds are heard, and the Person in blue beanie and glasses identifies its specialty as 'Tsukemen' (dipping ramen).

Fūnji.description: A small, crowded ramen shop located in a narrow alley, with a line of customers waiting outside and a self-service touchscreen ordering kiosk inside; the interior is dimly lit and crowded with patrons, featuring a wooden counter and stainless steel kitchen area with chefs in white uniforms.

Side plate of noodles.description: A white plate piled with plain, thick ramen noodles, served alongside the main ramen bowl at Fūnji, which the Person in blue beanie and glasses mentions he could 'barely even finish' as part of the 'Tsukemen' meal.

Touchscreen ordering kiosk.description: A digital self-service terminal inside Fūnji displaying menu items like 'Ramen' and 'Extra large noodles', with Japanese and English text, and payment options including cash and card; the screen shows a total of ¥1,500 after selection, though not directly visible in this segment, it is implied by the context of ordering.

Urban alley with 'YOLCO' storefront.description: A narrow city alley with modern buildings, visible signage including a 'YOLCO' storefront with a green and white sign, vending machines, and pedestrians walking by, forming the backdrop as the Person in blue beanie and glasses walks and speaks to the camera.

Ramen bowl with soft-boiled egg and seaw.description: A white ceramic bowl filled with ramen broth, topped with a soft-boiled egg, seaweed, and other garnishes, served at Fūnji, with a side plate of plain noodles placed next to it on the wooden counter; the Person in blue beanie and glasses identifies this as 'Tsukemen' and mentions struggling to finish the noodles.

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: Wears a blue beanie with white patterns, black-rimmed glasses, a camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie with a leopard-print design, and earphones; seen eating ramen at Fūnji with chopsticks, lifting noodles enthusiastically, and later walking through a city street while speaking to the camera in English, expressing that he is 'so full' after eating 'Tsukemen' and is concerned about his next meal, mentioning 'lunch number one' and 'Udonchin', and feeling like he has a 'food coma'.

raw_segments: The video opens inside Fūnji, a small, bustling ramen shop in a narrow Tokyo alley, where the atmosphere is lively with background chatter and Japanese speech, likely from staff welcoming customers and taking orders. An upbeat, slightly melancholic instrumental track begins to play as the camera focuses on the Person in blue beanie and glasses, seated at the wooden counter. He receives a steaming bowl of ramen with a soft-boiled egg and seaweed, along with a side plate of noodles, and begins eating enthusiastically with chopsticks. After finishing, the scene transitions to the exterior, where the same person, now wearing a camouflage jacket over his blue hoodie and beanie, walks through a busy city street. Speaking directly to the camera in English, he expresses, "I fear I may have made a mistake because I'm so full. I'm actually so full. Like, I could barely even finish the noodles that they gave us." He identifies the dish, adding, "Yeah, that spot is famous for its Tsukemen, which I guess is the like dipping ramen. It's really good, but now I'm concerned because this was supposed to be lunch number one. And I'm just really not sure if I can make it to Udonchin after that. I feel like I have a food coma right now." As he speaks, he adjusts his hood and jacket, revealing a blue beanie with white patterns, continuing his walk through a narrow alley lined with shops and signage, including a 'YOLCO' storefront, gesturing occasionally amidst the active urban environment.

event_blocks.summary: The Person in blue beanie and glasses, clad in a camouflage jacket and black-rimmed glasses, initially walks through a bustling urban alley featuring a 'YOLCO' storefront, speaking to the camera about having an hour to digest before a potential decision change, accompanied by upbeat, jazzy background music. The scene shifts to the interior of the 'RINKAN Shinjukuten' boutique in Tokyo, where the Person in blue beanie and glasses interacts with a Second man in gray sweatshirt, examining a Chrome Hearts jewelry display. After discussing sizes and items, including a new arrival blue ring, the main person tries on a black t-shirt, adjusts his beanie, and decides to purchase the ring, exclaiming, "We did it! We bought the ring!" The Second man in gray sweatshirt inquires if the camera is for YouTube, which the main person confirms. The video ends with the Person in blue beanie and glasses outside again, laughing while holding his phone and walking through the city, with a police officer visible in the background as the music fades.

Second man in gray sweatshirt.description: Wears a gray sweatshirt, glasses, and multiple necklaces, including a cross pendant; interacts with the Person in blue beanie and glasses inside the boutique, examining jewelry, engaging in conversation, providing information about sizes, items, and new arrivals, and recognizing the main person's online presence by asking 'Are you YouTube?'.

Black t-shirt.description: A plain black short-sleeved t-shirt worn by the Person in blue beanie and glasses inside the boutique, which he tries on and adjusts while examining himself in the mirror.

Chrome Hearts jewelry display.description: A glass case showcasing various silver and gold-toned rings, keychains, and other accessories with intricate designs, each labeled with 'Chrome Hearts' and prices in yen, such as ¥184,800 and ¥216,800.

RINKAN Shinjukuten.description: A high-end boutique in Tokyo, Shinjuku City, with a minimalist interior featuring concrete walls, glass display cases filled with Chrome Hearts jewelry, and clothing racks with denim and jackets; includes signage indicating direct shopping and purchasing services via QR codes.

Urban alley with 'YOLCO' storefront.description: A narrow city alley with modern buildings, visible signage including a 'YOLCO' storefront with a green and white sign, vending machines, and pedestrians walking by, forming the backdrop as the Person in blue beanie and glasses walks and speaks to the camera.

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: Wears a blue beanie with white patterns, black-rimmed glasses, a camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie with a leopard-print design, and earphones; seen walking through a city street while speaking directly to the camera, contemplating decisions, asking questions about sizes and items, expressing excitement and gratitude, confirming his identity as a YouTuber, and later returning to his original outfit while holding a phone and laughing.

raw_segments: The video begins with the Person in blue beanie and glasses, wearing a camouflage jacket and black-rimmed glasses, walking through a bustling urban alley with a 'YOLCO' storefront visible, speaking directly to the camera about having "an hour left" and needing to "walk around and digest" before potentially bailing on a decision. An upbeat, slightly jazzy background music track begins as the scene transitions to the interior of the high-end 'RINKAN Shinjukuten' boutique in Tokyo. Inside, the Person in blue beanie and glasses interacts with a Second man in gray sweatshirt, examining a Chrome Hearts jewelry display filled with ornate rings and keychains. They discuss sizes and items, with the main person asking "Can I try the one in the back?" and the second man confirming "This blue one?" and noting "This is today new arrival." The Person in blue beanie and glasses tries on a black t-shirt, adjusts his beanie, and then, with a decisive "Let's do it," holds up a newly acquired ring to the camera with a smile, exclaiming excitedly, "We did it! We bought the ring!" The Second man in gray sweatshirt, recognizing the camera, asks, "Are you YouTube?" to which the main person confirms. The video concludes with the Person in blue beanie and glasses back outside, still holding his phone and laughing, walking through the city with a police officer visible in the background, as the music fades.

event_blocks.summary: A Person in blue beanie and glasses, sporting earphones and a camouflage jacket, addresses the camera on a busy street, detailing a recent ring purchase that, despite initial thoughts of it being an impulse buy, was carefully considered before returning to the shop. He shares his satisfaction with the ring, which he describes as a "perfect fit" and "fits like a glove," noting a price reduction from "190 something" to "180" and expressing his excitement and happiness, particularly how it complements his "copyright beanie." As light background music commences, he turns and enters a modern urban walkway characterized by a glass ceiling and bright overhead lighting, passing beneath a prominent blue and white sign displaying Japanese text including '二子玉' and '西口'. The camera maintains close proximity as he announces his intention to meet his friend "Peace," speculating about "Peace's" location, possibly at the "Arcteryx store" nearby. The setting transitions to a more expansive, multi-level area with visible storefronts and digital displays as dusk settles, the twilight sky visible through the glass ceiling. He continues his vlog-style narration, maintaining eye contact with the lens, conveying a sense of discovery as he feels like he's "exploring new territory" and "unlocking new parts of the map" while navigating the environment.

Urban walkway with glass ceiling.description: A modern, covered pedestrian area with a glass and metal ceiling, bright overhead lights, and visible storefronts, featuring digital signage and a mix of natural and artificial lighting as dusk approaches, with the sky visible through the transparent roof.

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: Wears a blue beanie with white patterns, black-rimmed glasses, a camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie with a leopard-print design, and earphones; seen walking through a city street while speaking directly to the camera in a clear, engaging voice about a recent purchase (a ring) that fits perfectly and matches his 'copyright beanie,' expressing his happiness and excitement. He then transitions into a covered urban walkway, continuing his vlog-style monologue about meeting his friend 'Peace' at an 'Arcteryx store,' feeling like he's 'exploring new territory' with expressive gestures and smiles.

Blue and white sign with Japanese text.description: A large sign with Japanese characters including '二子玉' and '西口', along with a phone icon and 'FREE' text, indicating a location near Nishiguchi in Futako-Tamagawa, visible as the person walks beneath it.

raw_segments: The video opens with a Person in blue beanie and glasses, wearing a camouflage jacket and earphones, standing on a bustling city street and speaking directly to the camera. He explains that a recent purchase, which he describes as a ring that was a "perfect fit" and "fits like a glove," was not an impulse buy as he thought about it before returning to the shop. He recounts receiving a discount, bringing the price down from "190 something" to "180," and expresses how "stoked" and "very happy" he is, noting that the item matches his "copyright beanie." As he continues his vlog-style monologue, light background music begins to play. He then turns and walks into a modern, covered urban walkway with a glass ceiling and bright overhead lights, passing under a large blue and white sign with Japanese text including '二子玉' and '西口'. The camera follows him closely as he announces his plan to meet his friend "Peace," wondering aloud where "Peace" is and speculating if he's at the "Arcteryx store," which he believes is "right around the corner." The environment shifts to a more open, multi-level shopping or transit area with visible storefronts and digital signage as dusk approaches, with the soft blue twilight sky visible through the glass ceiling. He continues to smile and gesture, feeling like he's "exploring new territory" and "unlocking new parts of the map" while navigating the space, maintaining eye contact with the lens.

event_blocks.summary: The narrative begins inside KOFFEE MAMEYA, a minimalist café in Shibuya, Tokyo, where a man in a white shirt pours coffee from a metal kettle into a glass carafe amidst upbeat electronic music and observers, including a man with a camera and another holding a phone. The vlogger, identified as the Person in blue beanie and glasses, declares himself caffeinated after visiting the shop, which features a menu with single-origin coffees like 'Ijen Lestari' and 'Haile Selassie'. He then walks through a bright, bustling Tokyo street, explaining to the camera that he unexpectedly ran into friends, referred to as 'the crew' and 'the boys'. Interacting with the Man in black puffer jacket, who waves and smiles, the vlogger points out a distinctive glass-facade building and a white Jeep-like vehicle, expressing curiosity about its logo. He outlines plans to visit Omotesando and then Harajuku, noting it's his last full day in Tokyo before heading to Kyoto. The scene shifts to a clothing store where the vlogger examines and tries on a black t-shirt, observed by the Second man in gray sweatshirt. The video concludes with the group exiting the store and walking back into the sunlit urban environment, capturing the vibrant energy of Tokyo’s streets.

Man in black jacket with headphones.description: Wears a black jacket and large over-ear headphones, standing in the alley and looking at his phone, briefly visible before the group interaction.

Man in gray jacket with blue collar.description: Wears a gray jacket with a blue collar and sunglasses, part of a group of friends encountered unexpectedly in the alley, smiling and shaking hands with the main subject. He is identified by the main subject as "Elliot" and is heard responding with "Hey, nice to meet you" and "I'm good, the sun's out."

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: Wears a blue beanie with white patterns, black-rimmed glasses, a camouflage-patterned jacket over a blue hoodie with a leopard-print design, and earphones; he is the vlogger, speaking directly to the camera with expressive gestures and smiles, confirming he just left the coffee shop "super caffeinated," announcing he "ran into the crew," and sharing his plans to visit Omotesando and Harajuku, noting it's his "last full day in Tokyo before I go to Kyoto tomorrow." He also points out a car, saying, "Oh, that's fire."

Red and green striped tote bag.description: A large tote bag with bold red and green horizontal stripes, held by the Person in blue beanie and glasses, likely a recent purchase from the clothing store.

Man in gray sweatshirt with cap.description: Wears a gray sweatshirt and a white cap with 'MoMA' printed on it, seated at a restaurant table, holding a glass of orange juice and engaging in a toast.

KOFFEE MAMEYA.description: A small, wooden café with a black and white sign, located in a narrow alley, identified by the vlogger as the "coffee shop" he just finished at.

Woman in black coat.description: Wears a black coat and white sneakers, walking down the alley while looking at her phone, seen in the background before the group encounter.

Iced coffee and orange juice.description: Two beverages in clear glasses—one with iced coffee and a metal straw, the other with orange juice—clinked together in a toast at the restaurant table.

Man in green jacket.description: Wears a green jacket with a white collar and a logo on the chest, part of the group of friends, smiling and interacting warmly with the main subject. He is heard excitedly greeting the main subject with "Dude, what's up?" and playfully remarking, "You stopped though like you knew," also confirming, "Yeah, yeah."

Man in white hoodie and face mask.description: Wears a white hoodie and a white face mask, standing at a checkout counter in a store, interacting with a staff member or handling items.

Man in black puffer jacket.description: Wears a black puffer jacket and a gray cap; he is part of the "crew" the vlogger ran into, waving and smiling as the vlogger asks him, "You're in the vlog?"

Second man in gray sweatshirt.description: Wears a gray sweatshirt, glasses, and multiple necklaces, including a cross pendant; he is part of the "crew" or "boys" mentioned by the vlogger, seen looking on as the vlogger tries on a t-shirt.

Person pouring coffee.description: Wears a white shirt and is seen pouring coffee from a metal kettle into a glass carafe in a café.

Café menu display.description: A printed menu listing single-origin coffees such as 'Ijen Lestari' (Indonesia), 'Haile Selassie' (Ethiopia), 'Libertad Cuevitas' (Guatemala), and 'Gaturiri' (Kenya), with prices for 1 cup (¥700–¥900) and 150g (¥2,300–¥4,200), displayed on a wooden table.

White Jeep-like vehicle.description: A white, boxy, open-top vehicle resembling a Jeep, parked at a crosswalk near a modern glass-facade building, with Japanese text on its side.

Black t-shirt.description: A plain black short-sleeved t-shirt worn by the Person in blue beanie and glasses inside the boutique, which he tries on and adjusts while examining himself in the mirror.

Glass-facade building.description: A modern building with a distinctive diamond-patterned glass exterior, reflecting the sky and surrounding environment, located at a busy intersection in Tokyo.

Urban alley with 'YOLCO' storefront.description: A narrow city alley with modern buildings, visible signage including a 'YOLCO' storefront with a green and white sign, vending machines, and pedestrians walking by, forming the backdrop as the Person in blue beanie and glasses walks and speaks to the camera.

raw_segments: The video opens with an upbeat, slightly jazzy background track as a modern outdoor storefront, likely a clothing store, is shown with large glass windows displaying jackets and a digital screen featuring a mountainous landscape. The scene transitions inside where a man in a white hoodie and face mask stands at a counter, possibly checking out, while another man in a black puffer jacket gestures toward the camera. The background music continues as the scene shifts to a dimly lit restaurant where the Person in blue beanie and glasses, who is heard saying "in Tokyo" and later asking "How are you doing?", is seated with a Man in gray sweatshirt with cap. They clink glasses filled with iced beverages—orange juice and iced coffee—before the Person in blue beanie and glasses takes a sip through a metal straw, smiling at the camera and remarking, "It's like a mango." After a brief exchange of "Arigato gozaimasu" (thank you) in Japanese, the music transitions to a more melancholic, instrumental track with piano and strings. The Person in blue beanie and glasses is then seen browsing a camouflage-patterned jacket in a clothing store interior, then holding up a red and green striped tote bag. The video moves outdoors to a sunny, narrow urban alley with white buildings and a 'COFFEE & DOUGHNUTS' sign, where the Person in blue beanie and glasses walks past a Man in black jacket with headphones. The alley continues to a small wooden building with a 'KOFFEE MAMEYA' sign, where the Person in blue beanie and glasses unexpectedly meets a group of friends. With a surprised "Oh, what's up?" from the Person in blue beanie and glasses, the group, including a Man in green jacket who excitedly responds "Dude, what's up?" and playfully adds "You stopped though like you knew," and a Man in gray jacket with blue collar (identified as Elliot), greets each other warmly with handshakes and smiles, exchanging casual conversation. The Person in blue beanie and glasses asks Elliot, "Are you not cold?" to which Elliot replies, "I'm good, the sun's out." The camera captures close-ups of their laughing faces, with the bright blue sky and wooden textures of the building providing a backdrop. The final shot shows the group standing together outside the 'KOFFEE MAMEYA' café, located at 4 Chome-15-3 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan, as the instrumental music continues.

The video opens inside KOFFEE MAMEYA, a minimalist café in Shibuya, Tokyo, where a man in a white shirt pours coffee from a metal kettle into a glass carafe. Upbeat electronic music plays as a group, including a man with a camera and another holding a phone, observes. The vlogger, the Person in blue beanie and glasses, states, "All right, just finished up at that coffee shop. Now I'm super caffeinated." A close-up shows the café’s menu with single-origin coffees like 'Ijen Lestari' from Indonesia and 'Haile Selassie' from Ethiopia, with prices listed in yen. The vlogger then walks through a bright, bustling Tokyo street, speaking directly to the camera with expressive gestures and a smile, explaining, "we ran into the crew, which is crazy," and mentioning "the boys back there." He passes storefronts like 'Allegro' and 'FOX', interacting with the Man in black puffer jacket who waves and smiles, asking him, "You're in the vlog?" and encouraging viewers to "subscribe." The group continues walking amidst city ambiance, passing a distinctive glass-facade building and a white Jeep-like vehicle at a crosswalk, which the vlogger points out, saying, "Look at that car right there. I don't even know that logo. Oh, that's fire." He also shares plans to visit "Omotesando for a little bit and then back to Harajuku," calling it "the best area" and noting it's his "last full day in Tokyo before I go to Kyoto tomorrow." The scene transitions to a clothing store where the vlogger examines a black t-shirt, trying it on while the Second man in gray sweatshirt looks on. The video ends with the group exiting the store and walking back into the sunlit urban environment, capturing the vibrant energy of Tokyo’s streets.

event_blocks.summary: Outside a glass-facade building in Tokyo, a white Jeep-like vehicle is parked near a crosswalk as a vlogger asks his companion, Elliot, about his feelings, to which Elliot replies, 'This is going to be fun.' The vlogger then directs attention to exhibit details, prompting Elliot to admit, 'I don't know' when asked about the exhibit's meaning. Inside the brightly lit, industrial-style GENTLE MONSTER store, upbeat, futuristic music plays. The vlogger, wearing a camouflage jacket and black-rimmed glasses, explains his choice to wear contacts to better assess eyewear, then tries on various sunglasses, including a futuristic orange-tinted pair. The store's interior showcases stylized mannequins, one with a red boxing glove and another in a dynamic pose. The vlogger approaches a GENTLE MONSTER and TEKKEN 8 gaming station, inquires about using the glove, and plays a Tekken-style game using a joystick, achieving a score of '226 HIT' amidst audible punching and hitting sounds. Other visitors explore the interactive exhibits, contributing to the lively atmosphere blending fashion, technology, and entertainment.

Tekken 8 gaming screen.description: A digital display showing 'YOUR SCORE 226 HIT' with logos for 'GENTLE MONSTER' and 'TEKKEN 8', part of an interactive gaming station within the store.

Gaming station with joystick.description: A black gaming console with a joystick and buttons, branded with 'GENTLE MONSTER' and 'TEKKEN 8', used by the vlogger to play a fighting game, with a screen displaying 'YOUR SCORE 226 HIT', accompanied by distinct gaming sounds of punches and hits.

Futuristic orange-tinted sunglasses.description: A pair of stylish, angular sunglasses with orange-tinted lenses and metallic frames, worn by the vlogger as he explores the store, adding a bold fashion element to his look.

Mannequin in dynamic pose.description: A white, muscular mannequin in a fighting stance, wearing a white top and patterned pants, positioned as if mid-punch, part of a larger display with smaller figures around it.

GENTLE MONSTER store.description: A modern, high-tech retail space with exposed ductwork, glass walls, and interactive displays, featuring large mannequins, gaming stations, and branding for 'GENTLE MONSTER' and 'TEKKEN 8', located in a bustling urban area.

Glass-facade building.description: A modern building with a distinctive diamond-patterned glass exterior, reflecting the sky and surrounding environment, located at a busy intersection in Tokyo, visible in the opening exterior shot.

Mannequin with red boxing glove.description: A large, stylized mannequin in a dynamic pose, wearing a white top and patterned pants, with an oversized red boxing glove on one hand, displayed on a red carpeted platform inside the retail space. The vlogger asks if he can 'use the glove,' indicating curiosity about interacting with it.

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: Wears a camouflage-patterned jacket over a black hoodie, black-rimmed glasses, and later tries on futuristic orange-tinted sunglasses; actively vlogging and interacting with the camera while exploring a high-tech retail space, adjusting his glasses, and engaging with a gaming station. He explains he's wearing contacts to properly try on glasses, asks questions to a companion named Elliot, and is heard making distinct gaming sounds while playing Tekken.

White Jeep-like vehicle.description: A white, boxy, open-top vehicle resembling a Jeep, identified by the vlogger as a 'mini G-Wagen,' parked at a crosswalk near a modern glass-facade building, with Japanese text on its side, visible in the opening exterior shot.

raw_segments: The video opens with an exterior shot of a modern glass-facade building in Tokyo, where a white, boxy 'mini G-Wagen' is parked at a crosswalk. A man, who appears to be vlogging, asks his companion, Elliot, 'How do you feel looking at this?' to which Elliot responds, 'This is going to be fun.' The vlogger then points out details, saying 'Whoa, look at the eyes here,' before asking Elliot about the meaning of the exhibit, to which Elliot responds, 'I don't know.' The scene transitions inside to a brightly lit, industrial-style 'GENTLE MONSTER' store, where upbeat, slightly futuristic background music begins to play. The vlogger, wearing a camouflage-patterned jacket and black-rimmed glasses, explains that he's wearing contacts today because 'if you wear glasses to a glasses store, you can't see how you're looking.' He is seen exploring the high-end retail space, occasionally adjusting his glasses and interacting with the camera, as he tries on different pairs of sunglasses, including a futuristic orange-tinted pair. The interior features large, stylized mannequins, such as one with a massive red boxing glove and another in a dynamic pose, suggesting a theme of fashion and performance. The vlogger then approaches a 'GENTLE MONSTER' and 'TEKKEN 8' branded gaming station, asking if he can 'use the glove' before engaging with the joystick to play a Tekken-style game. The screen displays 'YOUR SCORE 226 HIT' as distinct gaming sounds of punches and hits are heard. Other visitors are seen browsing and engaging with the exhibits, contributing to the lively, interactive atmosphere of this modern, immersive blend of fashion, technology, and entertainment.

event_blocks.summary: The video begins with a close-up of a 'GENTLE MONSTER TEKKEN 8' gaming station, where a Person in blue beanie and glasses plays, exclaiming "Oh, nice. Thank you," and after completing a round, "Okay, complete. Thank you. Arigato gozaimasu. Arigato gozaimasu. This is so funny." He then admires a pair of dark, glossy rectangular glasses, noting a "10% off" discount and expressing interest. Moving through a modern GENTLE MONSTER store with exposed ductwork and glass walls, he interacts with the Second man in gray sweatshirt, confirming "This is it," and trying on futuristic orange-tinted sunglasses, feeling "kinda cool." The scene transitions to the exterior of Tonkatsu Maisen Aoyama, where he is seated at a wooden counter and eats a tonkatsu dish with breaded pork cutlet, rice, and a separate dish featuring a fried egg and garnishes, commenting, "We just ate lunch. Tonkatsu Maisen. I don't know if I'm saying that right, but..." The video concludes with the Person in blue beanie and glasses walking outside with a Group of friends, including the Second man in gray sweatshirt, in a bright urban alley, waving cheerfully at the camera.

Second man in gray sweatshirt.description: Wears a gray sweatshirt, glasses, and multiple necklaces, including a cross pendant; interacts with the Person in blue beanie and glasses inside the boutique, examining jewelry and engaging in conversation, asking 'This one?'

Tonkatsu Maisen Aoyama.description: A traditional Japanese restaurant with a wooden exterior and a sign displaying its name and address: '4 Chome-8-5 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan', explicitly named by the vlogger as 'Tonkatsu Maisen' after his meal.

Tekken 8 gaming screen.description: A digital display showing 'YOUR SCORE 226 HIT' with logos for 'GENTLE MONSTER' and 'TEKKEN 8', part of an interactive gaming station within the store.

Tonkatsu dish with fried egg.description: A rectangular black dish containing tonkatsu (breaded pork cutlet) topped with a sunny-side-up egg and garnished with green herbs, served with a side of shredded cabbage and a small bowl of miso soup.

Gaming station with joystick.description: A black gaming console with a joystick and buttons, branded with 'GENTLE MONSTER' and 'TEKKEN 8', used by the vlogger to play a fighting game, with a screen displaying 'YOUR SCORE 226 HIT', accompanied by distinct game sounds and the vlogger's verbal reactions like 'Oh, nice. Thank you,' 'Okay, complete. Thank you. Arigato gozaimasu,' and 'This is so funny.'

Group of friends walking outside.description: A group of young men, including the Person in blue beanie and glasses and the Second man in gray sweatshirt, walking together in a bright urban alley, smiling and waving at the camera, dressed in casual streetwear.

Futuristic orange-tinted sunglasses.description: A pair of stylish, angular sunglasses with orange-tinted lenses and metallic frames, worn by the vlogger as he explores the store, adding a bold fashion element to his look. He expresses his liking for them, saying 'Ooh, I like these,' notes they are '10% off,' and later remarks 'I feel kinda cool' while wearing them.

GENTLE MONSTER store.description: A modern, high-tech retail space with exposed ductwork, glass walls, and interactive displays, featuring large mannequins, gaming stations, and branding for 'GENTLE MONSTER' and 'TEKKEN 8', located in a bustling urban area.

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: Wears a camouflage-patterned jacket over a black hoodie, black-rimmed glasses, and later tries on futuristic orange-tinted sunglasses; actively vlogging and interacting with the camera while exploring a high-tech retail space, adjusting his glasses and engaging with a gaming station with verbal reactions like 'Oh, nice. Thank you,' 'Okay, complete. Thank you. Arigato gozaimasu,' and 'This is so funny.' He expresses interest in the glasses, saying 'Ooh, I like these' and 'I didn't realize it was 10% off. I'm gonna think about it, but I kinda want those.' He also interacts with the Second man, confirming 'This is it' and saying 'Oh, thank you,' and later remarks 'I feel kinda cool' while trying on glasses. He narrates his dining experience, stating 'We just ate lunch. Tonkatsu Maisen. I don't know if I'm saying that right, but...'

raw_segments: The video opens with a close-up of a sleek black gaming station branded 'GENTLE MONSTER TEKKEN 8', featuring a vibrant screen displaying a character in futuristic orange-tinted sunglasses. Game sounds accompany the Person in blue beanie and glasses as he interacts with the station, exclaiming "Oh, nice. Thank you," and upon completing a round, "Okay, complete. Thank you. Arigato gozaimasu. Arigato gozaimasu," adding "This is so funny." He then holds up a pair of dark, glossy rectangular glasses, remarking "Ooh, I like these," and noting, "I didn't realize it was 10% off. I'm gonna think about it, but I kinda want those," all set to an upbeat, electronic background music. He walks through a modern GENTLE MONSTER retail space with exposed ductwork and glass walls, engaging with the camera as he explores. Inside, he interacts with the Second man in gray sweatshirt, who asks "This one?" as the Person in blue beanie confirms "This is it," and thanks him. He tries on the futuristic orange-tinted sunglasses, feeling "kinda cool." The setting shifts to the exterior of Tonkatsu Maisen Aoyama, a traditional Japanese restaurant, where he enters and is seated at a wooden counter. He enjoys a meal of tonkatsu, taking bites of breaded pork cutlet and rice, and later savoring a dish with a fried egg and garnishes, narrating, "We just ate lunch. Tonkatsu Maisen. I don't know if I'm saying that right, but..." The video concludes with him walking outside with a group of friends, including the Second man in gray sweatshirt, in a bright urban alley, waving at the camera with a cheerful expression.

event_blocks.summary: Under a bright blue sky, the Person in blue beanie and glasses, clad in a camouflage-patterned jacket over a black hoodie and black-rimmed glasses, addresses the camera outdoors while gesturing with a small object, accompanied by an upbeat, lively background track. The scene shifts to the interior of a sushi restaurant where he dines with companions, including a Man in tan puffer jacket and a Man in black 'Call of Duty: Modern Warfare' t-shirt, around a table filled with sushi platters. Amidst the restaurant's ambient sounds, the Person in blue beanie and glasses praises the food, stating, "very good. And their sando, like their katsu sandwich, is probably my favorite," prompting a friend to recall, "My friend, oh yeah, right. I remember now." A female voice confirms with "Yes," and the Person in blue beanie and glasses exclaims, "I love it!" before expertly picking up sushi with chopsticks and taking a bite. A rapid montage follows, introduced by the on-screen text 'in the next vlog,' featuring a rooftop cityscape of Tokyo, the vlogger observing the scenery from a train, a traditional Japanese house adjacent to a canal, a currency exchange machine, meat sizzling on a tabletop grill, and a Blonde woman on a train. The vlogger then exclaims, "Let's go!" as the Blonde woman is seen holding two wooden wish plaques before a shrine, concluding with the on-screen prompts 'subscribe if u new here :)' and 'instagram @elliotochoy'.

Blonde woman.description: Has long blonde hair and is seen smiling on a train and later holding two wooden wish plaques in front of a shrine, wearing a black jacket and a white turtleneck; she appears cheerful and engaged with the camera.

On-screen text 'in the next vlog'.description: White text overlaid on various quick-cut scenes, indicating upcoming content in the vlogger’s series.

Tabletop grill.description: A black, portable grill with blue flames, used to cook thin slices of meat, with a hand using tongs to flip the meat.

Train interior.description: A green and beige train with large windows, where the vlogger and the blonde woman are seated, holding drinks and looking out the window.

Rooftop cityscape.description: A panoramic view of Tokyo’s urban skyline under a clear blue sky, showing a mix of traditional and modern buildings.

Man in black 'Call of Duty: Modern Warfa.description: Wears a black t-shirt with a 'Call of Duty: Modern Warfare' graphic, seated at the sushi table, eating and conversing with others.

On-screen text 'instagram @elliotochoy'.description: White text on a black background, providing the vlogger’s Instagram handle for social media engagement.

Sushi platters.description: Multiple wooden platters filled with various types of sushi, including tuna, salmon, tamago, and other nigiri, arranged neatly on the table with green leaves as garnish.

On-screen text 'subscribe if u new here.description: White text appearing on a black background, encouraging viewers to subscribe to the channel.

Currency exchange machine.description: A modern, brightly lit machine with a digital display and a glass front, located in a public area, possibly a train station or airport.

Man in tan puffer jacket.description: Wears a tan puffer jacket and is seated at the sushi table, actively eating with chopsticks and interacting with the group.

Sushi restaurant interior.description: A warmly lit dining space with wooden tables, green booth seating, and a tiled wall, featuring a group of people enjoying a meal together.

Traditional Japanese house.description: A wooden house with a tiled roof and a small garden, situated beside a canal, with a stone lantern and bamboo fencing.

Person in blue beanie and glasses.description: Wears a camouflage-patterned jacket over a black hoodie, black-rimmed glasses, and is seen speaking to the camera outdoors and later eating sushi with friends; his expression is engaged and animated throughout, and he speaks enthusiastically about food, stating "very good. And their sando, like their katsu sandwich, is probably my favorite," and later exclaiming "I love it" and "Let's go!"

Wooden wish plaques.description: Two small, rectangular wooden plaques with Japanese characters and images of a red shrine, held by the blonde woman in front of a shrine entrance.

raw_segments: The video opens with an upbeat, lively background track as the Person in blue beanie and glasses, wearing a camouflage-patterned jacket over a black hoodie and black-rimmed glasses, speaks directly to the camera outdoors under a bright blue sky, gesturing with a small object. The scene transitions to an indoor sushi restaurant where he is seated with several friends, including a Man in tan puffer jacket and a Man in black 'Call of Duty: Modern Warfare' t-shirt, at a table laden with various sushi platters. Amidst general restaurant ambiance, the Person in blue beanie and glasses enthusiastically states, "very good. And their sando, like their katsu sandwich, is probably my favorite," followed by a friend's voice saying, "My friend, oh yeah, right. I remember now." A female voice adds, "Yes," and the Person in blue beanie and glasses exclaims, "I love it!" as he picks up a piece of sushi with chopsticks and takes a satisfied bite. The scene then cuts to a quick montage labeled 'in the next vlog,' showcasing a rooftop view of Tokyo’s urban skyline, the vlogger on a train looking out the window, a traditional Japanese house beside a canal, a currency exchange machine, a hand grilling meat on a tabletop grill, and a smiling Blonde woman on a train. The vlogger's voice then exclaims, "Let's go!" as the Blonde woman is shown holding two wooden wish plaques in front of a shrine, before the screen displays 'subscribe if u new here :)' and 'instagram @elliotochoy'.
